system.vehicleTraits: Enclosed, Environmentally Sealed, Enhanced Auspex Arrays, Fear (3), Reinforced Armour, Walker, Super-heavy, Ion Shield (PR 50), Strikedown, Armour and War-Machine
system.pilotTalents: Lightning Reflexes, Sure Strike, Called Shot, Rite of Becoming
system.history: A Knight who has turned from the Emperor's light. Equipment often in poor repair, ammunition supplies exhausted, joints rusted and vulnerable. But still utterly deadly.
system.specialRules: Renegade: -10 to requisition rolls for ammunition and repairs. May have random equipment malfunctions at GM's discretion (vehicle with poorly maintained weapons).
